**Commit**: docs: add comprehensive CI/CD analysis and error visibility documentation

Added detailed analysis of CI build errors and error visibility system:

New Documentation Files:
- CI_ANALYSIS_INDEX.md: Navigation guide for CI/CD documentation
- CI_BUILD_ERROR_ANALYSIS.md: Deep root cause analysis of gdk-sys failures
- error_visibility_explanation.md: How the error visibility system works
- CURRENT_ERRORS.md: Analysis of current build errors
- FIX_APPLIED.md: Details of GTK dependency fix implementation
- COMPLETION_REPORT.txt: Status of CI improvements

Key Findings:
- gdk-sys v0.18.2 fails due to missing gdk-3.0.pc (GDK 3.0 library)
- Root cause: transitive dependency from notify-rust (likely)
- Previous fix incomplete: libgtk-3-dev insufficient, GDK 3.0 is separate package
- Error visibility system working perfectly: 303-line compilation output captured

Documentation covers:
- Multi-layer error capture mechanism
- Error storage in .github/ci-errors/ and .github/build-outputs/
- Git-based permanent error tracking (no external dependencies)
- How to query and search error history
- Why GTK/GDK is a transitive dependency
- Package structure issues in Ubuntu 24.04.4
- Multiple solution approaches for next iteration

This enables future developers to understand:
1. How CI errors are captured and made visible
2. Why previous fixes were applied and what was incomplete
3. How to debug similar build issues independently
4. The error visibility system design and benefits
